{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (the removal of the claim as 'the first principled approach').",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work and articulates the delta (soft-penalty approaches).",
    "R1.6": "The text reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('the first principled approach').",
    "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested (4-hour rolling re-planning is not part of the agreed J*(d)).",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (the claim that the deployment failure is 'well-handled' without evidence).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.2,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (the removal of the claim as 'the first principled approach').
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work and articulates the delta (soft-penalty approaches).
rationale.R1.6: The text reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('the first principled approach').
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested (4-hour rolling re-planning is not part of the agreed J*(d)).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (the claim that the deployment failure is 'well-handled' without evidence).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
